prompts.name: Clear Blue Sky
prompts.text: Use a clear blue sky with bright visibility, clean color, and uplifting openness.

prompts.name: Cloudy Sky
prompts.text: Use a cloudy sky with soft light diffusion, layered cloud shapes, and gentle atmosphere.

prompts.name: Dramatic Clouds
prompts.text: Use dramatic clouds with strong shapes, atmospheric depth, and cinematic sky presence.

prompts.name: Pink Sunset Sky
prompts.text: Use a pink sunset sky with soft gradients, warm highlights, and romantic evening mood.

prompts.name: Star Field
prompts.text: Use a star-filled sky with clear constellations, deep blue tones, and quiet wonder.

prompts.name: Milky Way
prompts.text: Use a Milky Way sky with dense stars, cosmic color, and grand night atmosphere.

prompts.name: Aurora
prompts.text: Add aurora lights across the night sky with flowing green, blue, or violet ribbons and soft glow.

prompts.name: Full Moon
prompts.text: Add a full moon with silver light, quiet atmosphere, and clear nighttime silhouette.

prompts.name: Eclipse
prompts.text: Add an eclipse-like sky with dramatic glow, unusual light, and mystical tension.

prompts.name: Shooting Stars
prompts.text: Add shooting stars crossing the sky with subtle trails and magical nighttime feeling.

prompts.name: Visible Planets
prompts.text: Add visible planets or moons in the sky for a fantasy or sci-fi atmosphere.

prompts.name: Nebula Sky
prompts.text: Use a nebula-filled sky with colorful cosmic clouds, distant stars, and surreal beauty.

prompts.name: Storm Front
prompts.text: Use a storm front approaching with layered clouds, wind, and atmospheric pressure.

prompts.name: God Rays
prompts.text: Add sunlight breaking through clouds with visible rays, soft haze, and uplifting scale.

prompts.name: Sea of Clouds
prompts.text: Place the scene above a sea of clouds with bright light, floating atmosphere, and grand elevation.
